name: Uranium Royalty Corp.
description: Uranium Royalty Corp. is a pure-play uranium royalty company focused on gaining exposure to uranium prices by making strategic investments in uranium interests, including royalties, streams, debt and equity investments in uranium companies, as well as through physical uranium holdings. The company's portfolio includes interests in various uranium projects across different stages of development, including production, development, and exploration. By leveraging its management team's deep industry expertise, Uranium Royalty Corp. aims to provide investors with a diversified and scalable exposure to the uranium sector, which is critical for global carbon-free energy production.
